ogTitle: Bournda vs Bow Bowing: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bournda and Bow Bowing.
heading: Bournda vs Bow Bowing — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bournda, New South Wales and Bow Bowing, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bow Bowing has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Bournda (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bournda or Bow Bowing safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bournda has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Bow Bowing scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bournda scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Bow Bowing scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bournda or Bow Bowing?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bow Bowing has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
